mapper.select: SELECT b.batchcode, b.batchname, b.startupmode, b.processstartdate, b.processenddate, b.status, b.statusinfo, b.sfapicallcount, b.fromdatetime FROM batchstatus b WHERE b.batchcode=#{batchcode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batchstatus (batchcode, batchname, startupmode, processstartdate, processenddate, status, statusinfo, sfapicallcount, fromdatetime) VALUES(#{batchcode}, #{batchname}, #{startupmode}, #{processstartdate}, #{processenddate}, #{status}, #{statusinfo}, #{sfapicallcount}, #{fromdatetime})
mapper.update: UPDATE batchstatus SET batchname=#{batchname}, startupmode=#{startupmode}, processstartdate=#{processstartdate}, processenddate=#{processenddate}, status=#{status}, statusinfo=#{statusinfo}, sfapicallcount=#{sfapicallcount}, fromdatetime=#{fromdatetime} WHERE batchcode=#{batchcode}
